description: SLS(27) SUPERSEDES SLS(25) and SLS(26). Cumulative: (1) SLS25 MA-fan trend consensus replacing the Hurst-first veto; (2) SLS26 IC significance shrinkage (ic *= min(1,|ic|/(2*SE)), SE=1/sqrt(n-3), n<=6 -> 0) applied to both g_RegimeIC and g_RegimeICCcy; (3) SLS27 COHERENCE SWEEP: (a) the consensus cut-points are no longer hardcoded 0.8/0.3 ATR -- new ART fields emaDispTrend/emaSlopeTrend are LEARNED per instrument via new ART_CalibrateStructural() at percentiles p60/p30 (forward-decl added, called from AnalyzeScoreDistribution after ART_Calibrate); (b) regime-8 Controlled-Pullback detection in BOTH the hard gate (ClassifyBarToRegime_Core) and its soft-score mirror used a hardcoded 0.002 fractional return while the same classifier already read ART-calibrated g_ART.moveSig -- both now use g_ART.moveSig. KEY CORRECTION: my earlier 89%/0% claim for SLS25 was CIRCULAR (trend/chop labels were defined by the same EMA200 displacement the rule tests). Re-validated against an ORTHOGONAL 100-bar regression-R2 label using raw price only: old Hurst veto discrimination -2.6 (fires MORE in chop than trend); hardcoded rule +11.9; percentile-learned rule +32.4. Percentile recipe verified portable: M5 +33.0, M15 +38.9, H1 +25.3. Structural parity verified (brace 0, paren identical to base). COMPILE-VERIFY ONLY; report errors, fix minimally, report exact changes.
